title: Mexican Toor Dal Tacos
description: A twist on traditional tacos, this recipe combines the flavors of Mexico and India for a delicious and unique dish.
instructions: Rinse the toor dal and soak it in water for 30 minutes.
Drain the water and cook the toor dal in a large pan with 2 cups of water until it's tender.
Heat oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it's translucent.
Add the chopped tomato, cumin, chili powder, and garlic. Cook for 2-3 minutes.
Add the cooked toor dal to the pan and stir well.
Add the lime juice and chopped cilantro to the pan and stir well.
Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp cloth and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by placing a spoonful of the toor dal mixture onto a tortilla and topping with sour cream, if desired.
